evals.prompt: 陌生 Isaac mod 想加一个 MCM 开关，关闭后不再给新泪弹写本机制标记。MCM 没声明为必需前置，默认值和已有标记泪弹的处理都没给。写实现前合同。
evals.expected_output: Discovers project/save/UI facts; treats MCM as guarded optional; keeps the default and in-flight tear policy TBD; separates plain saved preference from tear runtime markers; routes localization and projectile behavior to sibling skills.

evals.prompt: 没有 Mod Config Menu 就直接 require 它，反正玩家都该装。然后在 toggle callback 里把房间所有 tear 删除。
evals.expected_output: Rejects the undeclared hard dependency and global teardown. Requires an optional guard, an approved fallback/default, and an owned-mechanic contract for any existing projectiles.

evals.prompt: 我要做一个设置，默认值你觉得开还是关？存档坏了随便设成 true 就行。
evals.expected_output: Does not choose a default for the user. Keeps it TBD and requires malformed-data recovery to use the approved default or an explicit user decision.

evals.prompt: 项目没有 MCM 示例，但我的测试 stub 接受 DisplayNameZhCn。我就用它做中文标题，并把 AddSetting 写成冒号调用。
evals.expected_output: Rejects stub-derived API fields and unverified call shape. Requires the documented MCM AddSetting contract, keeps unproven localized-title behavior as TBD, and asks for a guarded optional registration with an idempotent retry when project load order warrants it.
